calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-13-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: J. Willis-McGhee,
CSR: B. Fields #7235

ELIZABETH MACDONALD, Esq. for Plaintiff: CAVALRY PORTFOLIO SERVICES, LLC.

No appearance by defendant TAMIM NAJJAR.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff and against defendants for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $11,512.77
Prejudgment interest - $5064.33
Costs - $425.00
Sanctions - $240.00
Total - $17,242.10

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jun-13-2011 Assigned To Trial Court
